docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,450.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTY GUADALUPE GAMINO ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT FAUSTO LOPEZ. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,450.00 US CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PUR TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTEREST PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO PAYOUT MONEY FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE)
